title: Reconnect to previously opened sessions on startup isn't working in NB 3405
author: krwudtke
body_snippet:
The option to "Reconnect to previously opened sessions on startup" isn't working on the latest NB (3405).
It used to work and is really a must have option, at least for me. If the app is closed with sessions open, when reopened, no sessions reconnect.

iterations.description: Bulk verified: commit f61f63c1 exists (MEDIUM confidence)

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

comments.author: krwudtke
comments.snippet: Which version, because it wasn't working in v1.80.1 — Security Patch either. And neither is the option to NOT show the panel tabs. (If "Always show panel tabs" is NOT checked, it still shows when there is only one panel. This eats screen real estate that I would rather use for the remote sessions.) I was planning to report these over there, but haven't had the time.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Reconnect on startup is a known feature that regressed in NB 3405, likely caused by changes to session persistence or startup initialization logic.
Approach: Trace startup sequence to find where previously-open connections are loaded and re-connected; compare behavior between NB 3404 and 3405 to identify the regression.
